title: Implement queries in Rust
description: Implement queries.rs matching Python. Consider regex crate for search.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented Rust query filters: added queries module, wired list command filters/search/sort, added cucumber query steps, and added unit tests. Tests: cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --test queries, cargo fmt --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Resolved rust cucumber step binding for query steps by switching to regex-based steps and adding parity placeholder steps. Removed unused maintenance step helpers to avoid warnings. Updated spec parity checker to read expr-based rust steps (kept), and adjusted Python query priority step to parse string. Tests: cargo fmt --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml, cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --test cucumber, python tools/check_spec_parity.py.
